data.title: Einride and PostNord expand electric operations in Norway, hitting 1.3M emissions-free km yearly in Oslo region. Goal to save 2,100 tonnes CO ₂ e by 2023.
data.description: Einride and PostNord have expanded their electric freight operations in Norway, now covering 1.3 million kilometers annually in the Oslo region with zero emissions. This partnership showcases significant scalability, following a deployment in 2023 that led to the saving of around 2,100 tonnes of CO2e over three years.

data.title: Valmet will release its January - September 2025 Interim Review on Oct 29, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Finnish time.
data.description: Valmet Oyj announced on October 10, 2025, that their Interim Review for January – September 2025 will be released on Wednesday, October 29, 2025, at around 9:00 a.m. in Finnish time. This news was made public at 10:00 a.m. EEST from ESPOO, Finland. The release will include important financial information for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: Dow drops over 200 points, Fear & Greed Index stays 'Neutral'. Corporate earnings help; Delta Air Lines net income $1.42B.
data.description: On Thursday, the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in market sentiment, maintaining its position in the "Neutral" zone. US stocks saw a decline, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 200 points. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite also retreated from their peak levels. However, there were some positive highlights in corporate earnings. Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) recorded a 4.3% increase after announcing a net income of $1.42 billion and adjusted EPS of $1.71 for the third quarter of 2025, surpassing expectations. PepsiCo Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) also saw an uptick in its performance. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: European DataWarehouse (EDW) presented the 4th annual Data Quality Award to CaixaBank SA for "CAIXABANK PYMES 13, F.T." deal at TSI Congress, Berlin.
data.description: In Berlin, Germany, during the 2025 TSI Congress, the European DataWarehouse (EDW) announced the winner of its fourth annual Data Quality Award. CaixaBank SA and CaixaBank Titulización SGFT, SAU were honored with the Best Data Quality – Deal of the Year (2024-2025) award for their deal, CAIXABANK PYMES 13, F.T. The prestigious award signifies excellence in data quality and was presented by EDW at the event. The recognition highlights the meticulous approach taken by CaixaBank in this particular deal, showcasing their commitment to high standards in data management.

data.title: SEK 2 billion notes issued by Municipality Finance under MTN programme.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a year. This news comes as a relief to many, particularly as the country continues to recover from the economic impacts of the pandemic. The report also shows that the economy added 531,000 jobs in the past month, beating expectations and pointing to a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, it highlights that the labor force participation rate has increased to 61.8%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. Overall, these numbers reflect a promising outlook for the economy and job market in the United States.
